content: Ha detto che si stava divertendo.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Guybrush88 (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:He said he was enjoying himself
eng:He said he was having a good time
eng:He said he was having fun
eng:She said she was having a good time
eng:She said she was having fun
eng:She said that she was enjoying herself
eng:She said that she was having fun
